value.found_quote: In this guide, we will focus on **configuring evals programmatically using the [Evals API](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/api-reference/evals)**.
value.rationale: The page describes the Evals API for configuring and running evaluations of model outputs programmatically via API, confirming the core claim. However, the page explicitly states the offering is being retired: "OpenAI is deprecating the Evals platform... Evals will become read-only for existing users on October 31, 2026, and the platform is scheduled to shut down on November 30, 2026." Since a shutdown/end-of-life date is given, lifecycle_status is sunset rather than active. Note: the claim's specific details about evaluation against external models and larger-scale batch evaluation are not specifically substantiated by the visible page text, but the existence and core function of the Evals API is clearly described.
